items.h: Biggest Winners And Losers Of The Week — 6/30/2026
items.p: After a weekend that saw four major events take place, from Slammiversary to Forbidden Door, here are your WINC winners and losers for the week of 6/30/26!

items.h: Will Ospreay Says ‘A Weight Lifted’ At AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door, Notes ‘A Much Heavier Weight Will Be On His Shoulders’ Until AEW All In
items.p: Will Ospreay talks about a weight lifting off his shoulders at AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door, noting he will carry a heavier one until All In. Over the course of the last several months, Ospreay has...

items.h: Tony Khan Comments On WWE Running Two Shows Against AEW All In
items.p: During AEW x NJPW: Forbidden Door, WWE announced two shows for August 30 when AEW ALL IN will also be taking place.

items.h: Brett Lauderdale Provides Update On GCW/Triller, Reveals Talks With MyAEW
items.p: Brett Lauderdale discusses GCW’s current standing in the world of streaming. GCW has been a cornerstone of FITE/Triller for over half a decade at this point. Still, there are many questions...

items.h: Tony Khan Reacts To NJPW Star Yota Tsuji Calling For AEW Boycott
items.p: AEW owner Tony Khan reacts to New Japan Pro Wrestling star, and IWGP Champion, Yota Tsuji calling upon his NJPW co-workers to boycott AEW shows

items.h: WWE's Nattie Responds To Forbidden Door Tribute From AEW Star
items.p: The Owen Hart Foundation Cup finals took place at Forbidden Door and Natalya weighed in on a tribute from the tournament.

items.h: Steven Spielberg told Brian Cage he’d love to come to AEW show
items.p: When they were working on “Disclosure Day,” Steven Spielberg told Brian Cage that he’d be interested in coming to an AEW show in the future. The legendary director released his latest film this...

items.h: Thekla Hoped To Join Prominent AEW Faction Before Signing With The Company
items.p: AEW Women's World Champion Thekla reveals that she hoped to join one of AEW's most prominent heel factions before she signed with the promotion

items.h: AEW star explains why he rejected WWE’s interest
items.p: Brian Cage discussed why he chose to stay with AEW despite notable interest from WWE when his contract with the former expired. He cited the stability, creative freedom, and long-term security he...

items.h: AEW announcer Jim Ross’ hospital stay almost over
items.p: It has been a trying 12 months for Jim Ross, but the Hall of Fame announcer shared some good news on Monday evening. For undisclosed reasons, Ross has been in an Oklahoma hospital since May 29....
